issues.sample: Issue seems to be with the steering of the car. It is very stiff and difficult to maneuver. Steering needs to be hold tightly to keep car in the lane, else car keeps on going towards the right side. I took the car to service center as well and they also acknowledged the problem a

The car is slamming on breaks at random no warning it is going to cause a reck a 18 wheeler almost killed us that was behind us. And I can be driving down the road and the wheel try to jerk me into another lane. This car is not safe. But is not having any warning lights going off

narrative.headline: What 2023 Kia Forte owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 56 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (23% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
